mapper.select: select * from nx_distributer_invite where invite_code = #{inviteCode} and status = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into nx_distributer_invite (inviter_nx_distributer_id, invite_code, invitee_phone, invite_type, status, reward_status) values (#{inviterNxDistributerId}, #{inviteCode}, #{inviteePhone}, #{inviteType}, #{status}, #{rewardStatus})
